data.reasoningText: The user wants me to build the .NET project in both Debug and Release configurations and create a binary log (binlog) for each build.

arguments.description: Build in Debug configuration with binlog
Build in Release configuration with binlog

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "cd /tmp/sv-034f800174314355b48e9b98547faa6f && dotnet build -c Debug /bl:Debug.binlog 2>&1 | tail -20", "description": "Build in Debug configuration with binlog", "initial_wait": 30}

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "cd /tmp/sv-034f800174314355b48e9b98547faa6f && dotnet build -c Release /bl:Release.binlog 2>&1 | tail -20", "description": "Build in Release configuration with binlog", "initial_wait": 30}

toolArgs.description: Build in Release configuration with binlog
